mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ow_message(no, sender_id, receiver_id, content) VALUES(seq_ow_message_no.NEXTVAL, #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT m.no, m.sender_id, s.nickname AS sender_nickname, m.receiver_id, m.content, m.is_read, TO_CHAR(m.reg_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') AS reg_date FROM ow_message m JOIN ow_member s ON m.sender_id = s.id WHERE m.receiver_id = #{receiverId} ORDER BY m.no DESC

SELECT m.no, m.receiver_id, r.nickname AS receiver_nickname, m.sender_id, m.content, m.is_read, TO_CHAR(m.reg_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') AS reg_date FROM ow_message m JOIN ow_member r ON m.receiver_id = r.id WHERE m.sender_id = #{senderId} ORDER BY m.no DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ow_message SET is_read = 'Y' WHERE no = #{no} AND receiver_id = #{receiverId}
UPDATE ow_message SET is_read = 'Y' WHERE receiver_id = #{myId} AND sender_id = #{partnerId} AND is_read = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ow_message WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = 'N'

SELECT partner_id, partner_nickname, unread_count, TO_CHAR(last_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') AS last_date FROM ( SELECT partner_id, MAX(partner_nickname) AS partner_nickname, SUM(unread_count) AS unread_count, MAX(last_date) AS last_date FROM ( SELECT m.receiver_id AS partner_id, r.nickname AS partner_nickname, 0 AS unread_count, m.reg_date AS last_date FROM ow_message m JOIN ow_member r ON m.receiver_id = r.id WHERE m.sender_id = #{myId} AND m.sender_deleted = 'N' UNION ALL SELECT m.sender_id AS partner_id, s.nickname AS partner_nickname, CASE WHEN m.is_read = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS unread_count, m.reg_date AS last_date FROM ow_message m JOIN ow_member s ON m.sender_id = s.id WHERE m.receiver_id = #{myId} AND m.receiver_deleted = 'N' ) GROUP BY partner_id ) ORDER BY last_date DESC

SELECT m.no, m.sender_id, s.nickname AS sender_nickname, m.receiver_id, m.content, m.is_read, TO_CHAR(m.reg_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') AS reg_date FROM ow_message m JOIN ow_member s ON m.sender_id = s.id WHERE (m.sender_id = #{userA} AND m.receiver_id = #{userB}) OR (m.sender_id = #{userB} AND m.receiver_id = #{userA}) ORDER BY m.no ASC

SELECT m.no, m.sender_id, s.nickname AS sender_nickname, m.receiver_id, m.content, m.is_read, TO_CHAR(m.reg_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') AS reg_date FROM ow_message m JOIN ow_member s ON m.sender_id = s.id WHERE (m.sender_id = #{myId} AND m.receiver_id = #{partnerId} AND m.sender_deleted = 'N') OR (m.sender_id = #{partnerId} AND m.receiver_id = #{myId} AND m.receiver_deleted = 'N') ORDER BY m.no ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE ow_message SET sender_deleted = CASE WHEN sender_id = #{myId} THEN 'Y' ELSE sender_deleted END, receiver_deleted = CASE WHEN receiver_id = #{myId} THEN 'Y' ELSE receiver_deleted END WHERE (sender_id = #{myId} AND receiver_id = #{partnerId}) OR (sender_id = #{partnerId} AND receiver_id = #{myId})

UPDATE ow_message SET sender_deleted = CASE WHEN sender_id = #{myId} THEN 'Y' ELSE sender_deleted END, receiver_deleted = CASE WHEN receiver_id = #{myId} THEN 'Y' ELSE receiver_deleted END WHERE no = #{no} AND (sender_id = #{myId} OR receiver_id = #{myId})
